Text: My chihuahua is a very picky eater. She wasn't eating her current food, so I ordered this to try and mix with her food to get her to eat it. Well, she picks out the Beneful and eats it only. Therefore, I give it 4 stars because she is actually eating this food, but I would prefer for it to be made with more natural, real ingredients. I compare this food to Kibbles and Bits which is more like junk food for dogs. Soft, chewy, junk food. But my chihuahua is a junk food junky. She'd rather eat treats and junk food than her all natural real chicken food. What can you do? LOL.

Summary: The ZOE  "Organic" EVOO is better than......
Text:
Seriously, I like this product a lot, and think it better than those recommended in the Cook's Classic Best Recipe series cookbooks: Davinci; Pompeian, and Colavita!

The smaller cans are a bit of a pain, but I do get to lick my (compulsively washed) fingers.

My favorite artesanal EVOO is Il Borro from Tuscany - I'll be there for the last 7 nights in March and plan to return with as much as I can carry. It is very floral/fruity with a hint of rich spicy herbs, and a bit of a bite on the finish - great stuff!

Provecho.
This soup taste OK, better than most.  But, it is very high calorie. I should have guessed, since it uses real cream.  I will try another brand next time.

Summary: With Pill Pockets my cat eagerly waits for his vitamins every morning!
Text:
Before I found Pill Pockets I had to trick, entice or coerce my cat by methods of whateverworks to take his vitamin supplement capsule for his skin & hair coat. He would lick off the "likeable" vitamin I had to crush and roll the capsule in to entice him to eat, and sometimes spit the darn capsule out, now punctured and leaking all over. Now with Pill Pockets (chicken flavor), I don't have to worry, as he readily waits for me every morning in the kitchen to get to his wrapped capsule. The formula of Pill Pockets allows you to mold it around the pill or capsule, as it is more pliable with the heat from your hands. These really are TERRIFIC! They have made a tedious, high stressed duty become an easy, daily ritual that is only stressed by the imploring eyes of my cat who now pesters me to give him his vitamin before I can get my morning coffee. I am also trying the Salmon flavor and will let you know how that is accepted.

Only complaint: Are there really 45 pcs. in each package? It seems only like 2 weeks ago I started using these with the lack of hassle. They are double the price from the local pet supply than online.

I bought this for the benefits of ginger and honey, and based on the high reviews. I enjoy hot teas and drinks in general. When I first tried this drink it was a little too spicey for me. I tried cutting it in half and that worked ok. The best solution for me is to add in a little cream or vanilla soy milk. It makes it creamy and just a little spicy like a chai tea. VERY enjoyable and soothing when not feeling well. It's also come in handy for morning sickness recently.

My son doesn't usually enjoy cookies unless they are chocolate chip, or have frosting on them, but when I gave my 2 yr old the quaker soft baked oatmeal cookie, he ate it right up! they were delicious!

Summary: Great for breakfast, nice snack you will KRAVE it
Text:
Named correctly KRAVE is one of the best cereals i've tasted in a long time. I first tried it as a dry snack and found it very satisfying then tried it with a bowl of milk and found it extremely tasty. It had a nice time span in milk before the soggys set in. I noticed my daughter really likes the cereal she had a box from the store she was enjoying when I was taste testing my box to write the review.

Would write more but on my way out the door to the store to get more :)

Thought this tea would have been more bitter, but it is surprisingly pleasant to drink without sweeteners!  Less bitter than a black or earl grey tea.  The pack of 3 is a wonderful deal as well.  Had to get creative with storing so much tea in my cupboard, but for the amount you get, the price cannot be beat. Highly recomended!

Summary: Tasty & healthier substitute for junk-food chips
Text:
Are you the type of person that always needs a side bag of chips to accompany their lunchtime sandwich but then feels pangs of guilt afterward for consuming that extra 120-200 trans-fat laden empty calories? If so, FoodShouldTasteGood's line of nutritious tortilla chips strikes an effective balance between satisfying your junk food cravings while providing some nutritional benefit by way of high quality ingredients and a few grams of fiber to boot.

The most important factor though is that with their 'Olive' line of tortilla chips (think of a white corn tortilla chip with flavor profiles of black and green olives and a hit of garlic) the taste itself is good enough to convince the staunchest junk-food addicts to reach into that bag for yet another bite. These chips go well with everything from sandwiches to soups as well as served plain by itself. These chips are tasty enough with the right crisp texture you've come to know and expect from your standard snack tortilla morsel. Great product all around.

I chose these cookies because I was lead to believe that they were some sort of really thin Newton (as the package implies) with the expected chewy/moist texture. Instead these are crispy cookies with a cracker like texture. While I was initially a bit surprised, I think that the Newton Fruit Thins are a great product. The cracker itself is subtle in its taste (only moderately sweet), crispy in texture, and contains bits of citrus flavored cranberries. I enjoyed them. They are good in isolation as a snack, but I would also recommend them with jam or cream cheese. My 19 month old daughter loves them.

The serving size is a little on the small side (3 crackers), but they don't appear horribly unhealthy.

Snyder's Honey Mustard & Onion Prezel Pieces might very well hold the title for most delicious non-candy snack item. A large bag rarely lasts a day in my house, which isn't a good thing when they're pretty caloric. They're so delicious you just want to stuff a whole handful in your mouth and slowly suck the flavor out of them, crunching on the remains as you look like a mad squirrel.

I would go as far as to say that you could eat these every day and not get tired of them. I would replace every meal of the day with these things if I wasn't afriad of them giving me heart disease.

Try them once and you'll be hooked. I have tried the other flavors since some stores run discounts, none of the other flavors were anywhere near as good as the Honey Mustard & Onion. Buttermillk Ranch is ok, but you can't top Cool Ranch Doritos. Cheddar Cheese wasn't good at all, and Buffalo Wing was hard to eat (flavor makes your hands all nasty).

Summary: a cure for the dog from Amazon
Text: My dog sometimes gets an upset stomach. The vet recommended that I feed Buddy rice and pumpkin to get him regulated again. Buddy is a large 100+ Golden Retriever. I didn't want to give him just any kind of pumpkin so looked for an organic one. He loves it - and it makes me feel good about giving it to him.

Summary: Better than an actual cup of Starbucks
Text:
In my opinion, this actually tastes better than an actual cup of Starbucks coffee. A real cup of Starbucks will taste burnt but Via does not. Also, and perhaps most important to me, I can get the temperature of the water to the exact temperature I like before mixing in the Via. No need to wait for it to cool down.

The Amazon price (60 cents/packet when I bought) really makes it worth buying for the convenience alone. Some people have suggested that this bargain-priced Via is somehow inferior to the one you buy in a Starbucks, e.g. expiration date is sooner, but it looks, smells, and tastes the same as the store-bought. The expiration date was 10 months ahead, if that's a concern.

I found this coffee really tasty.  It is difficult to catch a good Italian espresso that doesn't have an aftertaste, and for me, this coffee was rich and smooth with no burned taste.  It only has 10 grams of sugar which is a little over 2 teaspoons, not bad compared to other high calorie coffees.  The description in this page says it has 45 calories, but the can clearly says 50 calories.  I personally enjoyed it and found it pleasant to my taste buds.

The popcorn was very cheesy and tasted fresh. I would recommend this product to anyone who loves cheese popcorn.

Golden Gourmet Cheese Flavored Popcorn 6oz Bags - Case of 12 Bags
Love these pop chips----low fat and calories and yummy flavor.  Will definitely be ordering again!!!

Summary: They taste like Cracker Jack with chocolate on them
Text: And that can't really be bad, can it? This is definitely on the much, much sweeter side. I'm convinced that I have diabetes after consuming a box of this stuff. BUT, like all Snackwell items, they go for portion control by putting them in relatively small pouches. Overall, they taste great and make a good snack to toss in your back pack before a long day. Will definitely pick up another box...or three.

Let's face it: if you're looking into ordering this item, chances are that you remember eating it (or in my case, the Gebhardt clone) in your childhood. If that's the case, as far as I can tell, it's unchanged from those (again, in my case) far-off olden days, down to the alarmingly orange grease globs. How many other things from youthful memory are as you remember them? I haven't found this anywhere locally and the price of nostalgia seems reasonable to me. If you want to know about nutritional value, calories or the like, this is likely not for you, so KEEP LOOKING.
I really like the quality of this grape seed oil. The price was good, the shipping was fast and I have used it a lot in making my essential oil blends. Thank you.

It is a small basket, well packaged, looks nice. There just isn't a whole lot in there, and what is in there are small amounts (ie big box half full). I have ordered/received other baskets from Wine.com and been very pleased with them. I suppose for under $20 it is not a bad buy/gift.

Be careful when ordering.  The package I received was not air-vacuum sealed like previous orders.  As a result, the contents were comprimised, creating a rancid smell and bitter taste.  After one teaspoon I was forced to discard the entire contents of my 3-pound bag, which resulted in a complete waste of money.  Amazon does not allow returns for this product.  Buyer BEWARE.
Thought this would be the closest I can get to cafe-yummy.  Nope - it's fake.  Can't think of another word to describe it.  Coffee with fake caramel flavor.

So when I first smelled the dry powder I thought, oh tart, crisp, light, berry!
My daughter's first impression was "Mom this smells like Red Bull energy drink."
I was like OMG you are SO right!
It does! I have to admit. I do love Red Bull. Actually I had a bit of a Red Bull problem not too long ago, before tea! Thank you tea!
Nonetheless it has that exact same tart smell to it!
Don't worry though this is totally healthy!
Plus after preparing my matcha, adding some ice and milk, it tastes NOTHING like a red bull!
Okay maybe a little something like it in the sense that it is light, crisp, refreshing, not too tart but just a slight berry tartness but nothing that is going to make you pucker!
I love this!
I feel bad and I owe an apology to summer. Here I was craving autumn and forgot all about berries, fruits, juicy ripe tasting delights and had went totally for heavier, richer, creamier, flavors. But you know what ... it is still summer and I am going to totally enjoy drinking this and many other light matchas to come!
As I am sitting here in delight sipping away I am noticing this almost earthy flavor to it - no not the normal earthy grassy flavor of a matcha or green tea, but something else. The prominent flavors are still the same, tart, juicy, etc, not to be redundant, but there is something more, its one of those flavors you swish around in your mouth, tap tap tap your tongue around, make those smacking sounds trying so hard to pin point it but it is eluding me! I want someone else to get some of this so they can help me figure it out.
Yes this one is a delight and to think I almost passed it up I mean I was not too sure what to expect and didn't want something too overly tart but thank goodness I went for it!

These chips are great and so is the price! Other low calorie potato chips are made from a potato batter and usually have added sugar. These are real chips that taste great. Bet you can't eat just one.
Tommy loves Wellness and he really enjoyed this flavor. I always buy it in the bulk (30lbs) and he didn't complain once. He actually enjoyed it so much, he whined everytime dinner was coming up!

I have been subscribing to this carrots puree for months.  I mix it with organic unsweetened apple sauce, and my daughter, currently 17 months old, has been enjoying it for a number of months.  I have also used it, with very good results, in combination with green peas, and with chicken and vegetables purees.  Definitely a great product, and I would recommend it, and buy it myself again!

Summary: Good Coffee Good Price  No Waste
Text:
Timothy's Colombian Decaffeinated is a good tasting coffee for a good price. The savings are even better if you sign up for the auto renew program. Also, we have found that you can use each cup twice. Therefore it's like getting twice the quantity for the money. I checked with the Keurig company and they said by processing the cups for two cups of coffee or tea will not hurt the machine.

Best, Al
These are GREAT for growing any amount of sprouts, from a 1/2 tray to 3 full trays... LOVE THEM!!

As with the other Earth's Best products, Chunky Orchard Fruit is a quality and wholesome food for my baby.  According to the label, the ingredients are: Organic Apples, Water, Organic Apricots, Organic Pears, Organic Bananas, Organic Dehydrated Apples, Ascorbic Acid (Vitamin C).

Summary: A delicious breakfast drink, as well as "anytime treat"
Text: This chai is delicious.  In addition, I am most appreciative that there is a decaffeinated choice, since I cannot drink products containing caffein.  I often use it as a substitute (for coffee) breakfast drink, as well as a special treat for myself at times when I feel a need for some nurturing after a busy day.

I like maple sugar for flavoring homemade oatmeal and other things, and Coombs is generally good quality maple products. If you haven't tried maple sugar, you're missing out. I've used Coombs for products for many years and have never been disappointed.

Summary: My favorite pepper in the world
Text: If you're a big fan of pepper, then try this out. I absolutely love it. It's a bit pricey compared to normal pepper but the flavor is so wonderful.

I ordered these jordon almonds hoping I could get a good product using Amazon Prime. These are not good at all. they have a very hard thick coating that could easily break a tooth. The coating taste like hard sugar and you can not taste the almond at all. Very disappointed. Sorry.
These candy canes are a favorite in my house. They don't turn into the sharp slivers that happens when I suck on other candy canes. They sold out locally so fast, I had to order them online.

Summary: Best way to keep my toddler eating his veggies!
Text: My son has a very high gag reflex and transitioning to solids has been a task.  However, he also won't have anything to do with homemade baby food anymore.  We found these pouches when buying food for a trip and he was hooked.  I like that the veggies are organic, the pouches produce little garbage, that he can feed himself, but most importantly, that it is keeping the taste of veggies in his diet while we slowly work on chewing veggies.

These are a favorite at our home. We like the ones that have Sea Salt. We also like Barbeque flavored. These are not ruffly chips that have ridges. These are thickly cut plain slice potatoes. They are thick and crunchy and have a great texture in your mouth. They also have a great taste. The sea salt ones, which are a favorite, have just enough salt to have salt but not so much that you feel like you have to drink a gallon of water with your chips.

Enjoy.

I love the flavor of Maranatha.  It has a distinct almond flavor.  If you are looking for a peanut butter like flavor, go with Barney Butter.  However I like the almond taste of Maranatha almond butter.  If you aren't sure, try it a small jar at your supermarket first.  I read reviews that it tasted rancid, which is not the case.  Although if you expect this one taste just like plain peanut butter, you will be disappointed.
My dog is a service dog and she is kind of out in the woods lots so this is a very good training tool and treat Plus I can share them with other dog's if I see fit
Bought a case to see what it was about.  I am a night owl which effects my day-to-day performance and father-related tasks.  After a can I do feel mellow and finding myself going to bed much earlier.

My daughter ate this cookie and loved it.  She stated that it was soft and moist and not too sweet.  My baby also liked this cookie, his review was a little more understated though.  He cooed and smiled and tried to steal more from his sister.  I will definitely be purchasing this product in my normal grocery-shopping routine. I received this product complimentary for testing and review purposes from Influenster. @Quaker #quakersoftbaked @influenster

Summary: Love my Sweet Leaf Liquid Stevia
Text: I love the Sweet Leaf Vanilla Creme Liquid Stevia as well as many of the other flavors.  I use them everyday in my coffee.  I also enjoy the chocolate flavored one in my plain greek yogurt.  Yummy!

Summary: Smoked the house more than the food
Text: I bought this item based on such good reviews. I thought I would do some ribs in the stove using a smoker bag instead going out in the cold to use the barbeque grill, but what a mistake. I followed the directions exactly and all I got was a smoky house and smoky clothes. The ribs had a weird and faint wood taste not smoky like you get on the grill. YUCK! The ribs were the worst I ever tasted. I usually don't do reviews unless I feel it's necessary and this is one of those times. I really expected to have good results. I give this one TWO THUMBS DOWN.
I love it!! Delivered in just several days. Product is organic, good quality and I will order again!!

The new Cheesy Skillets dinner mix from Velveta is very easy to make and is good when you're pressed for time. The flavor I sampled was the Cheeseburger dinner which does indeed taste like a cheesburger. Prep. was very easy, just fry up some hamburg, add the mix and that's about it. If you're a family on the run or a single guy it's a great quick dinner.

Summary: Tastes Good, not a Rhianna fan.
Text: Tastes good, but one of two boxes that I ordered had most of the Coconut Water's opened.  Had to return a box.. Disappointed

The box came filled with Slim Jims! A funny knick knack to set out on your breakfast bar. Add a plate or slotted bank for the quarter and find yourself the talk of the neighborhood (not necessarily in a good way.)
This is the best of all hoisin sauce brands. Learned about it in my Chinese cooking classes.

I admit, I am a coffee snob. I buy good whole bean coffee and make it fresh ground at home. And I make it very strong.

I love Starbucks coffee. But I was skeptical about this instant version. However, I have to say it is very close the real thing! I am quite happy to make a cup of VIA when I don't feel like making a whole pot! It's SO easy and delicious!

I suppose it depends on what your tastes are, but these were not my faveorite. The milk chocolate was very smooth which was a plus. I don't care much for dark chocolate. maybe these weren't the best selection. They were good, but I would rather buy Lindt.

I had to order this online because my favorite local stores doe not carry this brand. The cheaper Paprika's they carry taste like chili powder. This is the real deal. So far only deviled eggs but I am just waiting for chance at goulashes or Russian Paprikashes.

Summary: Good when you need a boost
Text: I drink a 5 hour energy 2-3 times per week when I need the boost to make it to the end of the day and sometimes to get my day started.  I like the 5-hour energy over coffee.  Coffee tends to let me crash and the 5 hour does not.
A very tasty low cal treat. Lots of chips for 100cal. Kids love them, the wife likes them and, most important, I enjoy them.

Both are organic and cold-pressed. Barlean's Organic Oils Extra Virgin Coconut Oil, 16-Ounce Jar discernibly smells more of coconut. The consensus seems to be that it has a smoother texture and stronger coconut flavor. So if you're eating it by the spoonful or spreading it on toast or want a shot in your smoothie, that would be the way to go, if you don't mind paying a little more.

I'm mostly using coconut oil for cooking, so I like the more subtle fragrance of Nutiva. I can use it for most anything that calls for canola oil without everything tasting of coconut--mostly it just adds a certain savory quality, like umami, and makes your kitchen smell amazing.

It's also great as a deep-conditioning treatment for hair. I leave it in for a few hours and my hair feels soft and unprocessed after washing it out with my regular shampoo. I love it because it changes the texture of my hair without weighing it down.

Smooth. Very Smooth.

This English Breakfast Tea is very smooth, yet full-bodied. It doesn't have quite the bitter tannin punch I expected, considering I accidentally steeped it a bit too long. It still has a pretty robust tea flavor, just not as much bitterness I expected. This is a good thing.

Highly recommended. Surprisingly good even without sugar or cream.
